song_name: If You Love Somebody Set Them Free
version_description: Unique, jazz infused pop rock here. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Choruses play as intro. Outro plays as chorus repeating to fade with ad-libs.

versions.song_name: If You Love Somebody Set Them Free

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: If You Love Somebody Set Them Free

If you need some-body[/tab]

 If   you want some-one[/tab]

 You can do the same[/tab]


[Verse 2]

 If you want to hold on to your poss-ession[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]                    [ch]Bb6/F[/ch]                              [ch]C/E[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Csus4[/ch]
